heroBanner.tagline: We build your dream home at an affordable cost

features.title: Quality Products
features.description: By quality here we describe not just our quality of work; we use the best products from reliable brands and dealers to build a robust design throughout

features.title: Timely delivery
features.description: We know how essential time is for all of us. We promise and give plans with strict deadlines.

features.title: Competitive Pricing
features.description: Our plans have the right resource and materials, plus we also provide the best price to carry out big construction projects.

aboutUs.subTitle: SINCE 2014
aboutUs.title: Fornax Home Developers
aboutUs.description: The primary goal of Shantha Ventures is to provide quality construction work and unmatched customer satisfaction in this construction industry. We cater Industrial, commercial and residential construction projects. At present we are operating in and around Bengaluru. We offer our clients wide range of choices in terms of design, budget and location. We are the best pick when it comes to handling turnkey projects. "Our Motto is to keep the ASSURANCE DELIVERED.

services.title: Residential Construction
services.description: We believe that each customer has their own unique demands and requirements and to fulfill that demand we provide customized and tailored-made services to each individual client based on his/her requirements.

services.title: Commercial Construction
services.description: Our Commercial Construction service also includes hospitality building construction. So, whether you’re looking to renovate a restaurant, hotel or any other hospitality building or are planning to construct a new one we will provide you with the service you need.

services.title: Architecture & Structure
services.description: Understanding the Client's Requirements and vision, Collaborating with them to create a project which exceeds their Expectations.

services.title: Interior Design Service
services.description: Your space has to represent you- your tastes, your comfort, and your value. Each room has its own soul and each building its own story. We provide layouts, space planning, floor plans, elevations, details, and renderings.

testimonials.text: We got to know about Shantha ventures when we visited our friend's new house. When we approached shantha ventures for the construction of our house we received a professional response right from planning to implementation. The team is very professional and open to feedback. Thanks for the quality work.
Excellent craftsmanship and project execution. They managed everything from permits to final fixtures without any delays. Highly recommended for custom home construction!

videos.title: Duplex House in Bangalore | 30x40 or 40x40 Space Planning
